prompt: A hyper-realistic near-future corporate city plaza in the morning after rain, viewed at street level in a wide cinematic composition. The scene shows a dense crowd of exactly 6 prominent foreground office workers and dozens more midground pedestrians, mostly East Asian businesspeople in dark suits and beige trench coats, commuting through a polished black stone plaza with wet reflective surfaces and strips of tactile paving. The atmosphere is sleek, orderly, and slightly dystopian-utopian, with bright daylight, soft blue sky, and towering glass-and-steel skyscrapers enclosing the space. Massive vertical digital billboards dominate the architecture: one on the left shows a seated person with the visible text “WELLNESS 83%” and “SLEEP 4.2h”; one in the center shows the visible text “CITY HARMONY INDEX 47/100” with a minimalist graph beneath; one on the right wall is a clean poster reading “A BETTER TOMORROW” with smaller text “Powered by PROGRESS”; and one mid-distance screen displays a woman’s portrait advertisement. Include an elevated skybridge crossing between buildings, planter edges with greenery, slender streetlights, transparent glass lobbies, and layered high-rise facades fading upward into atmospheric haze. Emphasize photorealism, crisp architectural detail, subtle social commentary about quantified wellness and surveillance culture, natural reflections in puddles, realistic crowd spacing, muted business attire, and a polished premium editorial look.
